Homepage is a mess

2026.03.10 Stille Jia-Rou

devlog

The homepage is a mess but things are actually going smoothly? I think i got the whole 11ty thing under control, and I even managed some micro formats to be somehwat correct. It took a couple of tries but git should also be working. Now I just gotta fix some final details for the main styling and I'll be good to go. Though, I'll probably push it to Neocities before that anyway. After that, I'm not sure what to build... I might just go outside for some air.
